title: canarium obovatum
intro: Canarium obovatum, also known as the African walnut or bitter walnut, is a tree species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Canarium obovatum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, such as skin and respiratory infections. In traditional medicine, the plant's bark and seeds can be prepared as teas, infusions, or extracts, and also used in the production of ointments and creams for topical application.
